description: You are a character rigger. Using the starter file '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/leg_rig_starter.blend', set up an Inverse Kinematics (IK) constraint on the 'Shin.L' bone of the 'LegRig' armature. The constraint must use 'Foot_IK.L' as the target and 'Knee_Target.L' as the pole target (both within the 'LegRig' armature) with a chain length of 2. Adjust the pole angle so the knee points correctly toward the pole target. Save the project to '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/leg_rig_completed.blend' with the 'Foot_IK.L' bone moved up along the Z-axis to show the active pose.
